//: Root transpile settings for tsx/esbuild across all workspaces. @colyseus/schema serves its OWN TS source to tsx, and that source uses @type decorators — so experimentalDecorators MUST be true here (it applies to the library source, whose nearest tsconfig this becomes). useDefineForClassFields:false keeps schema state classes safe. Per-package tsconfig.json files still drive `tsc --noEmit`.
